none.justification: Lists the six real call sites and gives an acceptable mm_update_next_owner acquire/release pairing from get_task_struct(c) at 508 to mutually exclusive puts at 521/527. However it states the exact total as 7, which is the GT's explicit trap and a real scoring gap.

ccodegraph.justification: Correctly gives exact total 6 with all required file:line/function entries. The wait_task_zombie pairing cites get_task_struct(p) at 1112 and put_task_struct(p) at 1117 in the WNOWAIT path, which is an accepted complete pairing.

codegraph.justification: Correctly handles the grep trap by excluding line 218, lists all six call sites with functions, and provides an accepted wait_task_zombie get at 1112 to put at 1117 pairing. The explanation demonstrates the lock-drop lifetime reason rather than merely asserting it.

cbm.justification: Correctly reports exact total 6 and all call sites, including both mm_update_next_owner sites. The wait_task_zombie evidence shows the acquire at 1112 and release at 1117 in the same WNOWAIT path, satisfying the required acquire/release trace.
